title: Senior Teacher - IIT Madras International Enterprises - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - IIT Madras International Enterprises - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Teacher looking for your next big career move? IIT Madras International Enterprises in Rajkot offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About IIT Madras International Enterprises:
IIT Madras International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Madras International Enterprises!
